title: LastPass vs SentinelOne
description: Compare LastPass vs SentinelOne in July 20. We analyzed features, pricing, user ratings, and real-world performance to help you choose the right security & compliance tool.
verdict: After thorough evaluation, SentinelOne emerges as our recommendation for most users with a 4.2/5 rating compared to 4.1/5. However, the best choice depends on your specific needs. We recommend evaluating both tools against your requirements.

faqs.question: Which is better, LastPass or SentinelOne?
faqs.answer: Based on our detailed comparison, SentinelOne edges ahead with a 4.2/5 rating. LastPass excels at LastPass is a security & compliance platform that helps Consumers and Enterprise, while SentinelOne is stronger for AI-powered endpoint protection and cybersecurity platform..

faqs.question: What are the main differences between LastPass and SentinelOne?
faqs.answer: LastPass and SentinelOne differ in pricing (Free – $6/user/mo vs $5-8/device/mo), target audience, and feature focus. Our comparison table breaks down these differences.

faqs.question: Is LastPass cheaper than SentinelOne?
faqs.answer: LastPass starts at Free – $6/user/mo while SentinelOne starts at $5-8/device/mo. Consider total cost of ownership including implementation and training.

faqs.question: Which tool has better features, LastPass or SentinelOne?
faqs.answer: Both platforms offer strong features for security & compliance. SentinelOne scores higher overall, but specific feature needs may favor one over the other.

faqs.question: Can I use LastPass and SentinelOne together?
faqs.answer: Many organizations use both tools for complementary purposes. However, for overlapping use cases, choosing one streamlines workflows.

faqs.question: Which is easier to use, LastPass or SentinelOne?
faqs.answer: Both LastPass and SentinelOne prioritize user experience. The best choice depends on your team's technical expertise and workflow preferences.

faqs.question: Which platform has better customer support?
faqs.answer: Both offer documentation and support tiers. The quality varies by plan level — check our detailed review for support comparisons.

faqs.question: Which security & compliance tool is best for my team size?
faqs.answer: Enterprise features favor LastPass for large teams, while SentinelOne may be more suitable for smaller teams with its Free – $6/user/mo pricing.
